Class VaultKeyedValue<T>

java.lang.Object
iu.client.VaultKeyedValue<T>
Type Parameters:
T - value type
All Implemented Interfaces:
IuVaultKeyedValue<T>
final class VaultKeyedValue<T> extends Object implements IuVaultKeyedValue<T>
Basic IuVaultKeyedValue implementation.
